explanation: Applied torch.compile(mode='max-autotune') to the instantiated GPT model before handing it to the trainer. This preserves the model architecture and training logic while enabling compiler-based fusion and autotuned kernel selection for steadier throughput.

changes.description: Wrap the GPT model with torch.compile using max-autotune for compiler-based kernel selection.
changes.new_snippet:
model = GPT(config.model)
    model = torch.compile(model, mode='max-autotune') # profine: torch_compile_max_autotune

warnings: First iteration will incur compile overhead.
torch.compile may trigger recompilation if input shapes change, though this workload uses a fixed block size.
